## Why this source matters

- What recurring question would this source help answer?
- Why is the current graph not enough without it?

## Source details

- Source type:
- Source title:
- Source location or URL:
- Owning project or workspace:

## Expected placement

- Proposed domain:
- Likely target pages to update:
  - `wiki/sources/...`
  - `wiki/concepts/...`
  - `wiki/entities/...`
  - `wiki/syntheses/...`

## Notes

- Any known conflicts, caveats, or freshness concerns?
